{

content.text:
Typecheck clean. Files created:

- `src/components/prose/Prose.tsx` — wraps children in `div.t-prose.p-prose` (max-width 64ch via existing token).
- `src/components/prose/Anchor.tsx` — `<h2 id>` with leading `§` sigil, label, and `#` copy-link button (writes to clipboard + updates hash).
- `src/components/prose/Aside.tsx` — uses `Surface tone="mute" border padding={5}` with mono label `NOTE`/`WARN`/`VOICE`.
- `src/styles/prose.css` — resets for `p`/`h2`/`h3`/`ul`/`ol`/`a`/`code` inside `.p-prose`, vertical rhythm, anchor + aside styles. Imported in `globals.css`.
- 3 test files (Prose, Anchor, Aside) with 12 passing tests; Prose nests Anchor + Aside via snapshot.
